result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: F(x) = (n + 2/3) * (k_B * T_0 / l) * (x / (n * l))^(2/3)
JUSTIFICATION: For an adiabatic process in a freely jointed chain, the entropy is constant, leading to a force scaling as x to the power of -1/3 relative to the isothermal case, specifically F = (n+2/3)k_B T_0 (x/nl)^(2/3) when considering the internal energy dependence.
